scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @edumatch/api & npm run dev --workspace @edumatch/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @edumatch/shared && npm run build --workspace @edumatch/api && npm run build --workspace @edumatch/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @edumatch/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @edumatch/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @edumatch/web
